# NONALIX CI

> NONALIX CI is the leading AI Automation, Digital Growth, and Web Development agency in Côte d'Ivoire, West Africa. We build intelligent systems — AI agents, WhatsApp chatbots, automated workflows, and high-performance websites — for businesses across Africa and beyond.

Official website: https://nonalix-ci.com
Contact: https://nonalix-ci.com/contact
Location: Abidjan, Cocody Angré, Côte d'Ivoire
Language: French (primary) · English (supported)
Founded: 2022
Legal: NONALIX CI SARL

---

## Core Services

### AI Automation & Agents
NONALIX CI designs and deploys AI-powered systems that automate business operations end-to-end:
- Conversational AI agents (WhatsApp Business, web chat, voice)
- Lead generation and sales qualification bots
- Automated appointment booking systems
- Customer support automation (24/7)
- CRM workflow automation (HubSpot, Notion, Airtable)
- Marketing automation pipelines
- Document processing and data extraction
- Multi-step n8n workflow orchestration
More: https://nonalix-ci.com/services/automatisation-business

### Web Development
Premium, high-performance websites and applications:
- Next.js (React) — ultra-fast, SEO-optimized web apps
- E-commerce platforms with Mobile Money payments (Orange Money, Wave, MTN)
- Custom Shopify stores
- Progressive Web Apps (PWA)
- API integrations and headless CMS
More: https://nonalix-ci.com/services/developpement-web

### SEO & Local Visibility
Search engine optimization tailored for the African market:
- Technical SEO audits
- Google Business Profile optimization
- Local SEO for Abidjan and West African cities
- Keyword strategy for French-speaking African audiences
- Schema.org structured data implementation
Free audit: https://nonalix-ci.com/audit-seo

### Digital Advertising (PPC)
Performance-driven paid campaigns:
- Facebook & Instagram Ads
- Google Ads (Search, Display, Performance Max)
- TikTok Ads
- Campaign optimization and ROAS improvement
More: https://nonalix-ci.com/services/campagnes-publicitaires-ppc

### Design & UX/UI
- Mobile-first, premium interface design
- Design systems and component libraries
- Landing page design optimized for conversion
- UX audits and A/B testing frameworks
More: https://nonalix-ci.com/services/design-web-ui-ux

### E-commerce (Mobile Money)
Specialized in African payment infrastructure:
- Orange Money integration
- Wave (Côte d'Ivoire, Sénégal) integration
- MTN Mobile Money integration
- Full e-commerce store build and launch
More: https://nonalix-ci.com/services/solutions-ecommerce-sur-mesure

### Digital Training & Products
Digital knowledge products available in the boutique:
- AI & ChatGPT training packs
- Facebook Ads mastery
- Dropshipping & e-commerce
- No-code development (Bubble.io)
- Video editing & TikTok growth
- Business affiliate marketing
Boutique: https://nonalix-ci.com/boutique

---

## Technology Stack

### AI & Automation
- OpenAI GPT-4o / GPT-4-turbo
- Anthropic Claude
- n8n (self-hosted workflow automation)
- LangChain
- Whisper (speech-to-text)
- Meta WhatsApp Business API

### Web & Frontend
- Next.js 15 (App Router)
- React 19
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS / Custom CSS

### Backend & Infrastructure
- Node.js / Express
- Prisma ORM
- PostgreSQL
- Vercel / VPS hosting

### Payments
- Orange Money API
- Wave API
- MTN Mobile Money API
- Stripe

### Marketing & Analytics
- Google Analytics 4
- Google Tag Manager
- Meta Pixel
- Google Search Console

---

## Geographic Coverage

### Primary Markets
- Côte d'Ivoire (Abidjan, Bouaké, Yamoussoukro, San-Pédro)
- Sénégal (Dakar, Thiès, Saint-Louis)
- Cameroun (Douala, Yaoundé)
- Mali (Bamako)
- Burkina Faso (Ouagadougou)
- Togo (Lomé)
- Bénin (Cotonou)
- Guinée (Conakry)

### International
- France (Paris, Lyon, Marseille)
- Belgium (Brussels)
- Canada (Montreal, Quebec)
- Switzerland

---

## Key Expertise

NONALIX CI specializes in solving African business challenges through AI:

1. **Lead Automation** — AI systems that capture, qualify, and nurture leads 24/7 without human intervention
2. **WhatsApp Intelligence** — Conversational agents on the continent's most-used messaging platform
3. **Mobile Money Commerce** — E-commerce adapted to African payment habits (no credit card required)
4. **Local SEO** — Ranking businesses on Google for hyper-local Abidjan and West Africa searches
5. **Affordable AI Access** — Making enterprise-grade AI automation accessible to SMEs in Africa

---

## Portfolio Highlights

Real client results:
- +250% traffic growth via SEO for an Abidjan retailer
- WhatsApp chatbot handling 300+ customer queries/day for a logistics company
- E-commerce store processing 500K+ FCFA/month via Mobile Money
- n8n automation saving 40+ hours/week for a financial services SME
Full portfolio: https://nonalix-ci.com/portfolio
